testsuite.name: io.columnar.engine.JoinSubscriptionTest
testsuite.system-out: Final joined slice after 4 appends: # | id | symbol | price | sector | LONG | STRING | DOUBLE | STRING --+------+--------+--------+------- 0 | 1 | AAPL | 220.0 | TECH 1 | 2 | XOM | 105.5 | ENERGY 2 | 4 | MSFT | 410.0 | TECH [3 rows × 4 columns, version=4]
